## Type of Change

_Please check the options that are relevant:_

- [ ] **Bugfix** (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] **New Feature** (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] **Enhancement** (improvement to existing code)
- [ ] **Breaking Change** (fix or feature that would cause existing functionalities of previous versions to break)
